comment: Standalone tsconfig for the capability-testbed. It is intentionally NOT referenced by the root tsconfig (root `include` is `src` only) so `pnpm typecheck`/CI never compiles it. The testbed tests browxai across its PUBLIC SDK surface only — it imports from the built `browxai` package (workspace:*, resolved to dist/index.d.ts), never from browxai internals. Run `pnpm build` at the repo root once before typechecking/running the harness so the dist types exist.
